title: MobMons
description: Do you want to use Minecraft mobs as Pokemon? Now you can!!! :D
body:
Have you ever played Cobblemon and thought...?: _"Wow, how incredible would it be to capture a Creeper and use it in a battle against another Pokémon?"_. 

**With MobMons, you can do exactly that!**

_**If you want to install the data pack version you must put the file in both your resource pack folder and datapack folder located on your save (If you don't have a world created, you must create one first and then put this data pack on that folder).**_ 

# What is MobMons?
**MobMons** is a recreation of the original Minecraft mobs within the Cobblemon format. You are not actually capturing the mobs that spawn naturally; instead, you are capturing a "fakemon" version of each Minecraft mob. 

![What a rare Spider Jockey...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41fbb1ad11219667d29589c734b51a0f7541a4b0.png)

I highly recommend playing this mod alongside the [Cobbleverse modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobbleverse) for the best possible experience; however, it can be fully enjoyed on its own as well :)

## MobMons Features
Each of the created **MobMons** features its own **types**, **stats**, **moves**, **abilities**, **shinies**, **characteristics** and **custom animations**, all tailored to match the appearance and mechanics of each mob within the original game. You will be able to capture Creepers, Allays, Skeletons, and even Wardens with your Poké Ball and use them in **battle**, as **mounts**, or as companions throughout your adventure!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SxMOjc4Uu1s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Future Ideas
This initial version includes 15 unique mobs, though I plan to add every existing mob within Minecraft version 1.21.1. 

<details>
<summary>🚨SPOILERS🚨 - All MobMons</summary>
  
# 1.0.0

## Allay: Fairy/Ghost
![Allay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b80955f69b2c14ce9704c8bc79e1c61718d3ac.png)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 65,
    **Attack**: 70,
    **Defence**: 55,
    **Sp. Attack**: 100,
    **Sp. Defence**: 80,
    **Speed**: 100,
**Total**: 470

**Abilities**: Pick Up, Frisk, _**Hidden**: Serene Grace_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found in Pillager Outposts and Mansions. 

- **Rarely** found in Plains, Swamps, and Dark Forests.

## Armadillo: Ground/Rock
![Armadillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd61f878f861f82a18a2e4338e10191ec3180ded_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 75,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 125,
    **Sp. Attack**: 55,
    **Sp. Defence**: 85,
    **Speed**: 35,
**Total**: 460

**Abilities**: Sturdy, Sand Veil, _**Hidden**: Rock Head_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found in Savannas and Badlands, including their variants. 

## Axolotl: Water/Fairy
![Axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fedf110bf4e0da5535cb7bb55cefb2699728f89_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 85,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 75,
    **Sp. Attack**: 70,
    **Sp. Defence**: 65,
    **Speed**: 60,
**Total**: 440

**Abilities**: Water Absorb, Regenerator, _**Hidden**: Unaware_

**Spawn**: Depends on the color of the Axolotl.

    1. Pink:

      - **Commonly** found in Lush Caves. 

      - **Uncommonly** found in Warm Ocean.

    2. Wild (Brown):

      - **Commonly** found in Lush Caves. 

      - **Uncommonly** found in Warm Ocean.

    3. Gold:

      - **Uncommonly** found in Lush Caves. 

      - **Rarely** found in Warm Ocean.

    4. Cyan:

      - **Rarely** found in Lush Caves. 

      - **Rarely** found in Warm Ocean.

    5. Blue:

      - **Extremely rare** to find in Lush Caves. 

      - **Extremely rare** to find in Warm Ocean.


## Bat: Dark/Flying
![Bat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d50caaac93a399a6c9afb1a4ba25cb1182b0091_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 60,
    **Attack**: 75,
    **Defence**: 45,
    **Sp. Attack**: 75,
    **Sp. Defence**: 45,
    **Speed**: 100,
**Total**: 400

**Abilities**: Inner Focus, Unnerve, _**Hidden**: Infiltrator_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found underground in darkness in all biomes, except for the Deep Dark and Mushroom Fields.

- **Rarely** found in the open in darkness in all biomes, except for the Deep Dark and Mushroom Fields

## Bee: Bug/Flying
![Bee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c8ab8a4265f63e131f027f031bca840e3086ff_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 70,
    **Attack**: 80,
    **Defence**: 70,
    **Sp. Attack**: 65,
    **Sp. Defence**: 70,
    **Speed**: 75,
**Total**: 430

**Abilities**: Swarm, Unnerve, _**Hidden**: Compound Eyes_

**Spawn**: 

- **Extremely common** to find around natural Bee Nest.

- **Uncommonly** found in Plains, Flower Forest, Meadow, Cherry Grove, Sunflower Plains and Mangrove Swamp.

## Blaze: Fire
![Blaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0423721d49bdeb3b714ad3827193b20994a03ec1_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 70,
    **Attack**: 90,
    **Defence**: 60,
    **Sp. Attack**: 100,
    **Sp. Defence**: 80,
    **Speed**: 100,
**Total**: 500

**Abilities**: Blaze, Levitate, _**Hidden**: Flame Body_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found in Nether Fortresses.

## Bogged: Poison/Ghost
![Bogged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7410ec3d1339f29aecdf45b69fce1fce698d05c_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 60,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 30,
    **Sp. Attack**: 120,
    **Sp. Defence**: 40,
    **Speed**: 115,
**Total**: 450

**Abilities**: Cursed Body, Insomnia, _**Hidden**: Storm Drain_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found at night in Swamps and Mangrove Swamps, both underground and in the open. 

- **Uncommonly** found in Lush Caves.

## Breeze: Flying
![Breeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1ac1762039308fa6f1330f7f4fe406f7110ba0_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 70,
    **Attack**: 70,
    **Defence**: 40,
    **Sp. Attack**: 110,
    **Sp. Defence**: 50,
    **Speed**: 160,
**Total**: 500

**Abilities**: Sniper, Unnerve, _**Hidden**: Aerielate_

**Spawn**: 

- **Uncommonly** found in Jagged Peaks.

## Camel: Ground/Normal
![Camel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1ab06dc72c55ab17cdc45d2653b54b3bf1aeb9a_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 110,
    **Attack**: 95,
    **Defence**: 100,
    **Sp. Attack**: 40,
    **Sp. Defence**: 90,
    **Speed**: 50,
**Total**: 485

**Abilities**: Sand Force, Own Tempo, _**Hidden**: Water Absorb_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found in Deserts and Desert Vilages.

## Cave Spider: Bug/Poison
![Cave Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac636641656f059258703066237d692a83486148_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 55,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 65,
    **Sp. Attack**: 45,
    **Sp. Defence**: 50,
    **Speed**: 100,
**Total**: 400

**Abilities**: Rattled, Infiltrator, _**Hidden**: Corrosion_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found around cobwebs in Mineshafts. 

- **Uncommonly** found at night in Dark Forests.

## Creeper: Normal
![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf24332db4ac14c408993cc92d25074810fff830_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 65,
    **Attack**: 105,
    **Defence**: 55,
    **Sp. Attack**: 65,
    **Sp. Defence**: 55,
    **Speed**: 95,
**Total**: 440

**Abilities**: Aftermath, _**Hidden**: Scrappy_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found at night in all biomes except for the Deep Dark and Mushroom Fields, both underground and in the open. 

## Skeleton: Normal/Ghost
![Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0338f01f147e26d0393fc1ef9ff65f91e0a6ec9f_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 65,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 60,
    **Sp. Attack**: 85,
    **Sp. Defence**: 60,
    **Speed**: 95,
**Total**: 450

**Abilities**: Cursed Body, Keen Eye, _**Hidden**: Rattled_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found in Soul Sand Valleys in the Nether; at night in almost all biomes, both underground and in the open. 

- **Uncommonly** found in Nether Fortress; at night in Swamp, Mangrove Swamp and all snowy/frozen biomes, both underground and in the open.

## Spider: Bug/Dark
![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b949a6116407ce42f4a8a41e90271363d0332cc_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 85,
    **Attack**: 85,
    **Defence**: 75,
    **Sp. Attack**: 40,
    **Sp. Defence**: 55,
    **Speed**: 80,
**Total**: 420

**Abilities**: Rattled, Compound Eyes, _**Hidden**: Tinted Lens_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found at night in all biomes except for the Deep Dark and Mushroom Fields, both underground and in the open. 

## Stray: Ice/Ghost
![Stray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f9d7238738255b76521aa74b8f97c6efa9ba79_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 65,
    **Attack**: 120,
    **Defence**: 40,
    **Sp. Attack**: 85,
    **Sp. Defence**: 30,
    **Speed**: 110,
**Total**: 450

**Abilities**: Cursed Body, Ice Body, _**Hidden**: Refrigerate_

**Spawn**: 

- **Commonly** found at night in all snowy/frozen biomes (Deep Frozen Ocean, Frozen Ocean, Frozen Peaks, Frozen River, Grove, Ice Spikes, Jagged Peaks, Snowy Beach, Snowy Plains, Snowy Slopes and Snowy Taiga) except for the Deep Dark, both underground and in the open. 

## Legendary MobMon - Warden: Dark/Ghost
![Warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0878a8c522ec459bdd59552835bf27826514c60_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 140,
    **Attack**: 115,
    **Defence**: 110,
    **Sp. Attack**: 95,
    **Sp. Defence**: 80,
    **Speed**: 60,
**Total**: 600

**Abilities**: Soundproof

**Spawn**: 

- **Extremely rare** to find underground in Deep Dark.

## Secret Mobmon - Charged Creeper: Normal/Electric
![Charged Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad7374fb41fb054d8fc36ab50ae4e4f6178700b_0.webp)

**Base Stats**:
    **HP**: 70,
    **Attack**: 130,
    **Defence**: 60,
    **Sp. Attack**: 105,
    **Sp. Defence**: 60,
    **Speed**: 115,
**Total**: 540

**Abilities**: Aftermath, Scrappy, _**Hidden**: Electric Surge_

**Spawn**: 

- **Rarely** found in all biomes while thundering except for the Mushroom Fields.

</details>

In the future, I will include other mobs from versions beyond 1.21.1 (such as the Creaking), unused mobs (such as the Giant or Illusioner), and other secret mobs.

# Credits

This mod includes a resource pack created by [4tobi](https://modrinth.com/user/4tobi) called [Shiny Mobs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shiny-mobs). Most of the shinies featured in my mod are original creations made by him and **I do not claim ownership of any of those textures**. **All rights remain with the original creator**. You should check his mods :)

The **only shinies created by me from scratch** are those of the **Allay, Armadillo, Blaze, Bogged, and Warden**.
